race.description: Hawaii Five Oh @ Vinery Stud Handicap
race.comment: UNIQUE AMBITION (6) took some plain form into the Group 2 Guy Walter last start but she ran a mighty race at 200-1, leading for home and only conceding in the closing stages. Rock hard fit and loves soft tracks. Will roll along in front and prove tough to catch. FIDDLERS GREEN (9) circled the field and looked to have his chance but lacked the turn of foot required over 1400m at Rosehill last time. That followed a five-week let-up so he strips fitter and is looking for the mile now. BIANCO VILANO (1) got going when the bird had flown and just missed the placings first-up over 1550m at Canterbury recently. Will be better after one more run but is still one to watch for late in the piece. SPANISH BLAZE (3) comes north after a moderate return at Sandown last start. Not a noted fresh performer but has won two from two second-up so expect a lot more today. FREIGHT TRAIN (2) resumes. Beat Half Yours at his last appearance which is nice on the CV. Goes well fresh - respect.
